parameters.url: ={{ 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads?is_stale=eq.false&or=(and(lead_status.eq.New Lead,updated_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 2*60*60*1000).toISOString() + '),and(lead_status.eq.Researched,updated_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 2*60*60*1000).toISOString() + '),and(lead_status.eq.Scored,updated_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 2*60*60*1000).toISOString() + '),and(lead_status.eq.Campaign Assigned,updated_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 2*60*60*1000).toISOString() + '),and(lead_status.eq.Outreach Ready,updated_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 24*60*60*1000).toISOString() + '),and(lead_status.eq.Contacted,updated_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 30*24*60*60*1000).toISOString() + '))&select=id,lead_status,updated_at,full_name,email&limit=50' }}
